messages.content:
نقح وترجم للإنجليزية

عزيزتي لجين عزيزتي أماني نقدر لكم تعاونكم في المضي قدمآ بالحملة الترويجية لقنوات التواصل الالكترونية للمسشتفى مع ضرورة الإرشارة لرقم المسشتفى الموحد في هذه الحملة

Dear Lujain and Amani,

We appreciate your assistance in promoting the hospital's social media channels as part of our promotional campaign. It is also essential to emphasize the unified hospital number in this campaign.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

Dear Ms. Lujain and Ms. Amani,

We appreciate your cooperation in moving forward with the promotional campaign for the IMC e-channels, emphasizing the importance of including the IMC unified number in this campaign.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Dear Ms. Lujain and Dear Ms. Amani,

We appreciate your assistance in promoting the hospita social media channels as part of our promotional campaign. It is also essential to emphasize the unified hospital number in this campaign.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Dear Ms. Lujain and Ms. Amani,

We appreciate your cooperation in moving forward with the promotional campaign for the IMC e-channels, emphasizing the importance of including the IMC unified number in this campaign.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

is this correct

Kindly find the files that were on the links in the presentation in this compressed file.

Yes, that sentence is correct. However, if you want to make it a bit more formal, you could say:

"Please locate the documents that were previously accessed via the links in the presentation, and download them from the compressed file attached."

revised this

Thank you for meeting with us on Thursday, June 15, 2023

I would like to express my gratitude for your time and participation during our meeting, regarding adding ATS “ Ambulance Transportation Services “ Hotline in the IVR, Please find below the minutes of the meeting:

-	The ATS line will be added at the beginning of the IVR to facilitate the communication of patients needed ambulance transportation
-	A Cisco license will be provided to the ATS hotline.
-	Callers Experience Team will start training ATS Staff of Cisco Phone System
-	Calls will be transferred to the ATS hotline extension (2714) within 24 hours / 7 days.
-	If there is no response from the ATS hotline for more than 4 rings, calls will be automatically transferred to Bravo ATS (0515315396) within 24 hours.
-	In case the patient calls again and confirms that there is No Response from ATS Section, the Phone Operator team will forward an email in this regard TO: Mr. Hussam Nojoom and CC: Dr. Ahmed Alhaddad within 24 hours.

We appreciate your continued support and partnership

Dear [Name],

I want to extend my heartfelt appreciation for taking the time to meet with us on Thursday, June 15, 2023, regarding the addition of ATS "Ambulance Transportation Services" Hotline in the IVR. I am pleased to share with you the minutes of the meeting:

- The ATS line will be added at the beginning of the IVR to facilitate communication for patients in need of ambulance transportation.
- A Cisco license will be provided to the ATS hotline.
- The Callers Experience Team will commence training with the ATS Staff of the Cisco Phone System.
- Calls will be transferred to the ATS hotline extension (2714) within 24 hours / 7 days.
- If no response is generated from the ATS hotline for more than four rings, calls will automatically be transferred to Bravo ATS (0515315396).
- In the event that a patient calls again and confirms that there has been no response from the ATS Section, the Phone Operator team will send an email to Mr. Hussam Nojoom and CC: Dr. Ahmed Alhaddad within 24 hours.

We are immensely grateful for your continued support and partnership.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

revised
